items.title: Bill Belichick: UNC is "way ahead" of where it was a year ago, difference is "night and day"
items.summary: Bill Belichick’s first season as North Carolina’s head coach did not go as well as anyone affiliated with the university would have liked, with the program finishing 4-8 in 2025.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: ODI World Cup Qualifier winner gains direct entry to 2027 main round
